title: Dekton 3pc Assorted Bit Holder Set - 150mm Long | Hex Shape | Extra Strong Cr-v | 1/4" Shank | Ideal For Extending Different Screwdriver Bits, Drill, Batch Head & Screwdriver Head Conversion Uses
features: The Dekton 3pc Assorted Bit Holder Set features 150mm long bit holders, providing extended reach for hard-to-access areas. These extra-long bit holders are perfect for tasks where a standard-length bit just won’t do, allowing you to work efficiently in deep or narrow spaces without compromising on control or precision.

Hex Shape for Secure Grip and Stability: Each bit holder in this set is designed with a hexagonal shape, ensuring a secure and stable grip on your screwdriver bits, drills, or batch heads. The hex shape prevents slipping or wobbling during use, providing reliable performance and reducing the risk of damaging your workpieces or tools.

Constructed from Extra Strong Chrome Vanadium Steel (Cr-V): Durability is a key feature of the Dekton Bit Holder Set. Made from extra-strong Chrome Vanadium Steel (Cr-V), these bit holders are built to withstand heavy use and high torque applications. The Cr-V steel construction offers excellent resistance to wear and corrosion

1/4" Shank for Compatibility with Most Tools: The bit holders are equipped with a 1/4" shank, making them compatible with a wide range of power tools, including drills, screwdrivers, and impact drivers. The universal shank size ensures that these bit holders can be used across multiple devices, offering flexibility and convenience for professionals

Perfect for Screwdriver Head Conversion and Adaptation: The Dekton Bit Holder Set is also perfect for screwdriver head conversion, allowing you to quickly switch between different bit types or sizes without hassle. This adaptability makes it easier to tackle diverse tasks with a single tool setup, enhancing your efficiency and saving time on the job.
description: The Dekton 3pc Assorted Bit Holder Set is a versatile and indispensable addition to any toolkit, designed to enhance the functionality and reach of your screwdriver bits, drills, and batch heads. This high-quality set includes three bit holders, each measuring 150mm in length, providing the extra reach you need for those hard-to-access areas. Crafted from extra-strong chrome vanadium (Cr-V) steel, these bit holders are built to withstand the toughest tasks, offering exceptional durability and resistance to wear and tear. The Cr-V construction ensures that these holders maintain their strength and performance even under heavy use, making them a reliable choice for both DIY enthusiasts and professional tradespeople. The hex-shaped design of the bit holders provides a secure fit and prevents slippage, ensuring that your bits stay firmly in place during operation. This feature is particularly useful when working with power tools, as it guarantees stability and precision, reducing the risk of errors or damage to your workpieces. The 1/4-inch shank is compatible with a wide range of tools, making these bit holders incredibly versatile and suitable for various applications. The Dekton 3pc Assorted Bit Holder Set is ideal for a range of uses, from home improvement projects to professional construction tasks. Its extended length and durable construction make it perfect for reaching into tight spaces and accessing screws and fasteners that are otherwise difficult to reach.
